required_preferences.fact: Sends regular WhatsApp voice notes to his sister in Spain—no longer relies on morning exam texts; avoids sharing family updates on social media to protect her privacy abroad

supersedes.fact: Sends a morning check-in text to his sister on days he knows she has an exam—never posts family matters on social media

required_preferences.fact: Travels to partner offices for in-person pitch meetings—no longer hosts major presentations virtually from conference rooms or home

supersedes.fact: Switches to working from a quiet conference room for virtual presentations—never hosts high-stakes calls from home

required_preferences.fact: Schedules at least one dinner out each week with his father during visits—avoids repeating the same restaurant within a month when dining with family
Schedules mock panel sessions with external mentors and senior management before major industry presentations—never relies only on peer review within his project team for conference preparation
Calls his mother every Sunday afternoon at the same time—never misses unless traveling
Prioritizes networking with national competitors and industry leaders during conferences—actively seeks out cross-firm connections at large events, beyond routine regional outreach

persona: A recent MBA graduate working in business development for a logistics firm
